Notice Of Motion And Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement
Off Calendar Nov-07-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Gay Crosthwait Grunfeld of the law offices of Rosen Bien Galvan & Grunfeld LLP (415-433-6830) appears as counsel for plaintiffs/moving parties

Attorney, Donna Mezias of the law offices of Akin Gump Strauss Hauer & Feld LLP (415-765-9575) appears as counsel for defendant/non-opposing party

Court confers with both sides as set forth in the transcript of the certified shorthand reporter. Court compliments plaintiff attorney's office for an exemplary briefing and presentation of this motion. Court indicates it will allow objectors to be heard in court withou prior written objection.

PLAINTIFFS DAROL SMITH, JOSEPH RODRIGUEZ'S Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement is GRANTED. Preliminary findings, guidelines and deadlines for final approval to be set forth per written order. This action is set for hearing on Plaintiffs' Motion for Final Approval of Class Action Settlement on March 19, 2018 at 9:30 AM in Department 302/Law and Motion.

Judge: Harold Kahn: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: Reyes F. Hunter, CSR No. 6576, e-mail: rhunter@sftc.org. (L&M302)

Off Calendar Oct-19-2017 Continued To Nov-07-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Gay Grunfeld, (415-433-6830) of Rosen Bien Galvan & Grunfeld LLP for Plaintiff DAROL SMITH, JOSEPH RODRIGUEZ.
Donna Mezias, Esq. and Dororthy Kaslow, Esq. (415-765-9500) of Akin Gump for Defendant Shorenstein Hays-Nederlander Theaters LLC.

(as fully reported in the reporter's notes) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF DAROL SMITH, JOSEPH RODRIGUEZ and the Putative Class's Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Action Settlement is continued to November 7, 2017 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302 for a fuller explanation on the PAGA claims. Goodman, Court Reporter: Lewis Gillian , CSR No:12355 , email: lgillian@sftc.org. (D302)
